$comment: Holo Trade Phase 0 (read plane) of ADR-0070. Hand-authored P0 stub; once the catalog/lock/seal cascade runs (tools/gen-app-defs.mjs etc.) this is regenerated from the hub catalog.
name: Holo Trade
summary: A self-sovereign trading terminal over Hyperliquid verifiable, key-less, in the browser.

description.p: Trading shouldn't mean trusting an exchange's account, holding API secrets, or running a server.

Holo Trade is the intent surface over Hyperliquid's on-chain order book. Phase 0 is the live read plane: perp markets, a per-market live order book and trade firehose, and read-only account positions & fills straight from the official Hyperliquid Info API + WebSocket, key-less, serverless, verified in your browser (Law L5).

ul: Live perp markets mark price, funding, open interest, 24h volume
Per-market live order book + trade firehose (WebSocket)
Read-only account positions & fills by 0x address
No key, no signing in P0 signing arrives in P1 via the wallet's default-deny gate (ADR-0070)

releases.description: Phase 0 (ADR-0070): the live read plane over Hyperliquid HyperCore markets terminal, live order book + trade firehose, read-only positions & fills. Reuses the shipping HyperCore Info/WebSocket layer verbatim. No signing key (zero key risk).
